refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall update the worksite model within the customer-required timeliness for operational use, ensuring data acquisition, processing, and dissemination meet the latency target.
refined_fr.rationale: To meet the overall latency requirement, the update process is decomposed into sub-functions addressing data acquisition, processing, and dissemination, which collectively impact end-to-end latency.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure latency at each sub-function stage (data acquisition, processing, dissemination) and end-to-end update latency under representative operational scenarios.
sub_frs: FR1: Acquire real-time worksite data within required latency
FR2: Process and update worksite model data within required latency
FR3: Disseminate updated worksite model to stakeholders within required latency

candidate_dps: DP1: Use high-frequency telemetry data streams with priority network scheduling
DP2: Implement incremental model update algorithms optimized for low-latency processing
DP3: Employ multicast dissemination over dedicated network links with QoS guarantees
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to address acquisition, processing, and dissemination respectively

potential_sources: Tight coupling between data acquisition and processing due to real-time constraints
Dependency of dissemination on processing output freshness
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is inherent but managed by clear interface definitions and modular design.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network infrastructure supports required QoS and latency
Risk of processing delays due to unexpected data volume spikes
Assumes telemetry data is reliable and timely
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor real-time data loads and adapt processing algorithms dynamically to maintain latency.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for data acquisition, processing, and dissemination of worksite model updates

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time sensor and vehicle data for acquisition

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data transmission for processing and dissemination

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Disseminates updated worksite model to operator and teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends safety-related updates based on worksite model changes

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module containing all DP logic for worksite update latency.
Limited containment; mainly data source, not processing.
Receives updates but does not process or acquire data.
Consumes safety alerts but not involved in update processing.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing update latency functions within NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports tight latency control.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Risk of interface overload with multiple external connections
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution to isolate acquisition, processing, and dissemination.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: High complexity within NGHE Solution module may increase diffusion risk
Multiple external interfaces require robust interface management
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the primary module, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via latency measurements at module interfaces and end-to-end system tests.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of functions to NGHE Solution with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for internal modularization within NGHE Solution to reduce complexity
Define interface protocols explicitly to manage multiple external connections

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the latency requirement with clear FR->DP->IM mapping and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Acquire real-time worksite data within required latency
FR2: Process and update worksite model data within required latency
FR3: Disseminate updated worksite model to stakeholders within required latency

revise.why: Plan internal modularization within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and interface diffusion.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely
open_risks: Processing delays due to data volume spikes
Interface overload risk at NGHE Solution boundaries
